376730*u^38 + 707977*u^37 - 938278*u^36 + 915717*u^35 - 669438*u^34 + 369275*u^33 - 155444*u^32 + 51853*u^31 - 14886*u^30 + 3899*u^29 - 835*u^28 + 112*u^27 - 6*u^26)*v^2 + (15*u^43 - 193*u^42 + 1114*u^41 - 3740*u^40 + 7761*u^39 - 8983*u^38 + 572*u^37 + 19162*u^36 - 40755*u^35 + 50193*u^34 - 42614*u^33 + 26000*u^32 - 11401*u^31 + 3495*u^30 - 704*u^29 + 82*u^28 - 4*u^27)*v + u^42 - 14*u^41 + 91*u^40 - 364*u^39 + 1001*u^38 - 2002*u^37 + 3003*u^36 - 3432*u^35 + 3003*u^34 - 2002*u^33 + 1001*u^32 - 364*u^31 + 91*u^30 - 14*u^29 + u^28;
q := (v-u+2)/(u+v);
t := (u-v)*(u-v-2)*(u+v)/(u^3-u^2*v-2*u^2+u*v^2+2*u*v-v^3-2*v^2+2);
E := [0,t^2-2*q*t-2,0,-(t^2-1)*(q*t+1)^2,0];
P := [R!0,0];
Q := [(t+1)*(q*t+1),t*(q*t+1)*(t+1)];
